WCW vs. nWo World Tour: Recompiled (beta)
==========================================

A native PC port of WCW vs. nWo World Tour (N64, USA), produced by static
recompilation. This download contains NO game assets — you must own the game
and supply your own ROM of the US release.

Getting started
---------------
1. Unzip this folder anywhere and run WCWRecompiled.exe.
2. Click "Load ROM" and select your WCW vs. nWo World Tour (USA) ROM
   (SHA1 5AD2D8359058C8BB71F08E3D3433B7A50D3BB645). The launcher validates
   and remembers it.
3. Click "Start Game".

Notes
-----
- Windows may show a SmartScreen warning because the exe is unsigned:
  "More info" -> "Run anyway".
- Saves and settings live in %LOCALAPPDATA%\WCWRecompiled\. To make the
  install portable instead, create an empty file named portable.txt next to
  the exe.
- A log file (WCWRecompiled.log) is written to the same folder — include it
  when reporting bugs.
- Controllers are plug-and-play: pads are auto-assigned to players 1-4.
  F11 or Alt+Enter toggles fullscreen.

Project page, source code, and issue tracker:
https://github.com/jessetbh/WCWvsNWOWorldTourRecomp

License: GNU GPLv3 (see COPYING). This project is not affiliated with or
endorsed by Nintendo, THQ, AKI, or WWE.
